summary: Completed e2e testing for Yaren Alaca PR site (backend + frontend). All 6 backend pytest cases pass (root welcome, POST /api/leads collaboration + media_kit, missing-email 422, GET /api/leads sorted desc with no _id leak and ISO datetimes). Frontend: header / hero / 4 platform cards with correct external hrefs + target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer / 8 categories / 6 campaign steps / social slider / footer with 5 social icons / contact form full submission flow with success state + field reset / EN<->TR language toggle all verified. Zero console errors during full page traversal.

naming_convention_notes.note: Stats use data-testid pattern 'impact-stat-{slug-of-label}' (e.g. 'impact-stat-combined-audience-reach') instead of indexed 'impact-stat-0..3' mentioned in the spec. They DO match the requested 'impact-stat-*' wildcard pattern, so this is acceptable. If indexed selectors are preferred for automation, consider switching to 'impact-stat-0/1/2/3'.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py mongo_url uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] (hard key access) at import time — fine since .env is loaded first; consider .get with explicit failure for clearer errors.

POST /api/leads currently has no email format validation (uses plain str). Consider EmailStr from pydantic[email] for stronger validation (currently 422 only fires on missing field, not malformed email).
FinalCTA: when type='media_kit', message field is not required (good) but a media_kit submission with empty form still POSTs successfully if name+email provided. This matches the model — acceptable.
No rate limiting / spam protection on /api/leads (public form). Recommend adding throttling or CAPTCHA before production.
seed_data_creation: Test leads created in MongoDB 'leads' collection with TEST_ prefix on name/email (TEST_Collab User, TEST_MediaKit User, TEST_Persist, TEST_E2E User). Safe to leave or purge via db.leads.delete_many({'name': {'$regex': '^TEST_'}})
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_leads_api.py and pass against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend Playwright coverage in this iteration: header (incl. lang toggle EN<->TR), hero (portrait + CTAs + mini stats), 4 platform cards with external href verification, impact section + 4 stats, 8 categories, 6 campaign steps, social slider, footer w/ 5 socials, contact form submission with success + reset. No backend or frontend bugs found.
